sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_list (id INTEGER, values_list LIST INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_list VALUES (1, [1, 1, NULL, -3, 1, 5]), (2, [2, 2, NULL, 4, 3, 2]);
SELECT id, array_distinct(values_list) AS distinct_values FROM test_list;
UPDATE test_list SET values_list = array_distinct(values_list) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_distinct(ARRAY_APPEND(values_list, 6)) AS updated_distinct_values FROM test_list;
